PowerShell($proc = Start-Process -FilePath ".\\target\\debug\\mgdpdf.exe" -ArgumentList "tests\\fixtures\\hello.pdf" -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput stdout.log -RedirectStandardError stderr.log; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; if \(-not $proc.HasExited\) { Write-Output "OK: process is running \(PID $\($proc.Id\)\)"; Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force; Write-Output "--- stderr ---"; Get-Content stderr.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "--- stdout ---"; Get-Content stdout.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } else { Write-Output "FAIL: process exited with code $\($proc.ExitCode\)"; Write-Output "--- stderr ---"; Get-Content stderr.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "--- stdout ---"; Get-Content stdout.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Remove-Item stdout.log,stderr.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
PowerShell(cargo build:*)

PowerShell($proc = Start-Process -FilePath ".\\target\\debug\\mgdpdf.exe" -ArgumentList "tests\\fixtures\\hello.pdf" -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput stdout.log -RedirectStandardError stderr.log; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; if \(-not $proc.HasExited\) { Write-Output "OK: process is running \(PID $\($proc.Id\)\)"; Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force; Write-Output "--- stderr \(filtered\) ---"; Get-Content stderr.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-String -NotMatch "wgpu_hal::vulkan|egui_wgpu|wgpu_core" } else { Write-Output "FAIL: process exited with code $\($proc.ExitCode\)"; Get-Content stderr.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Content stdout.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Remove-Item stdout.log,stderr.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell($proc = Start-Process -FilePath ".\\target\\debug\\mgdpdf.exe" -ArgumentList "tests\\fixtures\\form.pdf" -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput stdout.log -RedirectStandardError stderr.log; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; if \(-not $proc.HasExited\) { Write-Output "OK: process running \(PID $\($proc.Id\)\)"; Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force; Write-Output "--- stdout \(head\) ---"; Get-Content stdout.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5 } else { Write-Output "FAIL: exit $\($proc.ExitCode\)"; Get-Content stdout.log,stderr.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Remove-Item stdout.log,stderr.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell(cargo build 2>&1 | Out-File -Encoding utf8 b.txt; Get-Content b.txt | Select-String -Pattern "warning:" | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString\(\) } | Sort-Object -Unique; Remove-Item b.txt; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath ".\\target\\debug\\mgdpdf.exe" -ArgumentList "tests\\fixtures\\hello.pdf" -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput so.log -RedirectStandardError se.log; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; if \(-not $proc.HasExited\) { Write-Output "GUI OK \(PID $\($proc.Id\)\)"; Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force } else { Write-Output "GUI FAIL exit $\($proc.ExitCode\)"; Get-Content so.log,se.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Remove-Item so.log,se.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
PowerShell(if \(Test-Path assets\\fonts\\Caveat-Regular.ttf\) { Write-Output "EXISTS: $\(\(Get-Item assets\\fonts\\Caveat-Regular.ttf\).Length\) bytes" } else { Write-Output "MISSING" })

PowerShell(New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path assets\\fonts | Out-Null; $url = 'https://github.com/google/fonts/raw/main/ofl/caveat/Caveat%5Bwght%5D.ttf'; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile assets\\fonts\\Caveat-Regular.ttf -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "Downloaded: $\(\(Get-Item assets\\fonts\\Caveat-Regular.ttf\).Length\) bytes" } catch { Write-Output "FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://github.com/google/fonts/raw/main/ofl/caveat/OFL.txt' -OutFile assets\\fonts\\Caveat-OFL.txt -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "OFL: $\(\(Get-Item assets\\fonts\\Caveat-OFL.txt\).Length\) bytes" } catch { Write-Output "OFL fetch failed \(non-fatal\): $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("assets\\fonts\\Caveat-Regular.ttf"\); $txt = [System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString\($bytes\); Write-Output \("size: {0}" -f $bytes.Length\); Write-Output \("has fvar \(variable\): {0}" -f $txt.Contains\("fvar"\)\); Write-Output \("has glyf: {0}" -f $txt.Contains\("glyf"\)\); $idx = $txt.IndexOf\("Caveat"\); if \($idx -ge 0\) { Write-Output \("name region: " + $txt.Substring\($idx, [Math]::Min\(40, $txt.Length-$idx\)\)\) })

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("assets\\fonts\\Caveat-Static.ttf"\); $txt = [System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString\($bytes\); Write-Output \("size: {0}" -f $bytes.Length\); Write-Output \("has fvar \(variable\): {0}" -f $txt.Contains\("fvar"\)\); Write-Output \("has glyf: {0}" -f $txt.Contains\("glyf"\)\))

PowerShell(Copy-Item assets\\fonts\\Caveat-Static.ttf assets\\fonts\\Caveat-Regular.ttf -Force; Remove-Item assets\\fonts\\Caveat-Static.ttf; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("assets\\fonts\\Caveat-Regular.ttf"\); $txt = [System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString\($bytes\); Write-Output \("Caveat-Regular.ttf now: {0} bytes, variable={1}" -f $bytes.Length, $txt.Contains\("fvar"\)\))
